channel.title: Comments on: To The Third And Beyond

item.title: By: Aditya
item.dc:creator: Aditya
item.description: It has been great working with you guys! Thanks a lot for staying by a helping me learn from my mistakes! :D
item.content:encoded: It has been great working with you guys! Thanks a lot for staying by a helping me learn from my mistakes! 😀

item.title: By: Stish Sharma
item.dc:creator: Stish Sharma
item.description: Congratulations to each member of the FV Team. This is just the beginning. :)
item.content:encoded: Congratulations to each member of the FV Team. This is just the beginning. 🙂

item.title: By: Ayush Punn
item.dc:creator: Ayush Punn
item.description:
Thanks for jubilant words, it was pleasure working with you and ForzaVeyhan. I really had huge learnings! We missed it by a whisker! ForzaVeyhan will miss a leader like you next year.
ForzaVeyhan rocks. :-)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for jubilant words, it was pleasure working with you and ForzaVeyhan. I really had huge learnings! We missed it by a whisker! ForzaVeyhan will miss a leader like you next year.

ForzaVeyhan rocks. 🙂

item.title: By: Capt Rohit Saxena
item.dc:creator: Capt Rohit Saxena
item.description:
The great art of story telling. Not all have this acumen and it is even more commendable for a person with a technological bent of mind. A deadly combination.
It is heartening to see schools promoting such things and you guys making the best of it. Good job!
item.content:encoded:
The great art of story telling. Not all have this acumen and it is even more commendable for a person with a technological bent of mind. A deadly combination.

It is heartening to see schools promoting such things and you guys making the best of it. Good job!

item.title: By: Nirmal Singhal
item.dc:creator: Nirmal Singhal
item.description: Congrats! Gautam and your team as well. I am proud of you. Hard work, determination and focusing on the target have brought you success. Love and blessings.
item.content:encoded: Congrats! Gautam and your team as well. I am proud of you. Hard work, determination and focusing on the target have brought you success. Love and blessings.

item.title: By: Suresh Kumar
item.dc:creator: Suresh Kumar
item.description: FV team rocks! You guys did a wonderful work. If you had speed tested your car a number of times as I had suggested Gautam, you would have been the winners and would have a chance to compete in the US. Never mind, all the best! :-)
item.content:encoded: FV team rocks! You guys did a wonderful work. If you had speed tested your car a number of times as I had suggested Gautam, you would have been the winners and would have a chance to compete in the US. Never mind, all the best! 🙂

item.title: By: Hyperbole
item.dc:creator: Hyperbole
item.description:
Applying cutouts of printed papers as stickers - Not a good idea.
This post is brimming with hyperbolic statements and exaggerations. Man, did you just write this post to impress (or possibly, flatter) your colleagues?
Accept this harsh criticism of mine. Thanks.
item.content:encoded:
Applying cutouts of printed papers as stickers – Not a good idea.

This post is brimming with hyperbolic statements and exaggerations. Man, did you just write this post to impress (or possibly, flatter) your colleagues?

Accept this harsh criticism of mine.
Thanks.

item.title: By: Charvi
item.dc:creator: Charvi
item.description:
It was a very enriching experience to work with you. Learnt many things like team management, bits of tech stuff and how to channelise individual differences into productive outcomes. Thank you. :)
ps. Hope to work on Arduino with you next year! ;)
item.content:encoded:
It was a very enriching experience to work with you. Learnt many things like team management, bits of tech stuff and how to channelise individual differences into productive outcomes. Thank you. 🙂

ps. Hope to work on Arduino with you next year! 😉
